title: agrostis anemagrostis subsp. interrupta
intro: Agrostis anemagrostis subsp. interrupta is a subspecies of grass, specifically a type of bluebells grass. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis anemagrostis subsp. interrupta include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
